title: Infosys launches advanced AI, cybersecurity and space technology center at Hubballi Development Center
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the launch of the Infosys Center for Advanced AI, Cybersecurity, and Space Technology at its Hubballi Development Center in Karnataka on August 06, 2025. The center is part of Infosys Living Labs, a network of over 12 established centers globally, and positions Hubballi as a technology hub for advanced digital solutions including AI, cloud computing, cybersecurity, engineering services, SAP, and space technology. The Hubballi Development Center has over 1,000 employees and will serve global clients across manufacturing, financial services, retail, and healthcare.

key_facts.fact: Infosys said the Hubballi center specializes in advanced digital solutions including AI, cloud computing, cybersecurity, engineering services, SAP, and space technology.

key_facts.fact: Infosys reported over 1,000 employees working out of the Hubballi Development Center.
